title: Improve live UI loading time
description: Measure and improve live website UI loading latency with frontend and backend changes where useful. Run thermo-nuclear code quality review after each improvement and complete the branch/push workflow.
close_reason: Completed live UI loading performance improvements

title: Make full backend pytest runnable without a live server
description: Running /Users/admin/StockScreenClaude/backend/venv/bin/pytest from backend collects tests/integration/test_production_performance.py, which executes at import time and posts to http://localhost:8000/api/v1/scans. In a normal local/CI test run without a live backend, collection exits with ConnectionRefusedError/SystemExit before the rest of the suite can run. Move this performance smoke behind an explicit marker, guard import-time execution, or document/run it separately so the default backend pytest gate is reliable.

title: Stabilize backend full unit suite
description: During live UI loading work on 2026-06-15, focused daily snapshot tests passed, but a broader backend/tests/unit run was interrupted after 5m41s with 1,403 passes and 8 unrelated failures: MCP market overview snapshot task ordering, cache refresh workflow expectations, and orphaned scan cleanup SQLite uniqueness setup. Reproduce with backend venv pytest backend/tests/unit, isolate current expected market/task fixtures, and make the suite reliable again.

title: Stabilize frontend UI test timeouts under full-suite runs
description: During the sparkline rollback cleanup on codex/improve-live-ui-loading, repeated frontend full-suite runs showed timeout/state-wait failures that moved between heavy UI tests (ThemesPage, RRGChart, StaticScanPage, AssistantWatchlistDialog, App.static). Focused reruns of some files passed, pointing to suite-level timing pressure or async cleanup issues rather than the rollback itself. Follow up by isolating the slow/flaky tests, fixing missing act/wait cleanup, and making npm run test:run reliable without requiring timing luck.
notes: 2026-06-15 follow-up evidence from codex/improve-live-ui-loading: npm run test:run -- --testTimeout=60000 produced 447/448 passing tests, with only src/components/AssistantChat/AssistantWatchlistDialog.test.jsx failing in the full run. Immediate isolated rerun via npm run test:run -- AssistantWatchlistDialog.test.jsx passed 3/3 in 6.12s. This reinforces suite-level async/timing isolation rather than an App.jsx regression.
